datey 0.0.0.9000
  • Home
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Specification
  • Change log

Package index

Creation and conversion

datey()
Create a datey from a calendar year (including its fractional part) or another date type
start_day() mid_day() end_day()
Create a datey for the start, middle or end of a day
as_start_day() as_mid_day() as_end_day()
Coerce a calendar year (including fractional part) or another date type to a datey for the start, middle of end of the day
durationy()
Create a durationy from an annual duration
as.double(<datey>) as.integer(<datey>)
Convert a datey to calendar years (including fractional part)
as.double(<durationy>) as.integer(<durationy>)
Convert a durationy to duration in years
to_ymdf() from_ymdf()
Create or decompose a datey using calendar year, month, day and day fraction

Text parsing and printing

datey(<character>)
Parse text as a datey
durationy(<character>)
Parse text as a durationy
as.character(<datey>) format(<datey>) print(<datey>)
Format or print a datey
as.character(<durationy>) format(<durationy>) print(<durationy>)
Format or print a durationy

Checks

is_datey() is_durationy()
Is x a datey or a durationy?
is_start_day() is_mid_day()
Is a datey the start (or end) or middle of a day?
is_leap_year()
Is x a leap year?

Validity

is.na(<datey>) anyNA(<datey>) is.na(<durationy>) anyNA(<durationy>)
Whether datey or durationy are NA
NA_datey_
The datey version of NA
NA_durationy_
The durationy version of NA
valid_years_start valid_years_end valid_duration_years_max
Integer constants

Summary statistics and operators

mean(<datey>) mean(<durationy>)
Mean value of datey or durationy
Summary(<datey>) Summary(<durationy>)
Minimum, maximum or range of datey or durationy
Ops(<datey_type>)
Operators for datey and durationy

Utility

c(<datey>) c(<durationy>)
Combine multiple datey or durationy vectors

On this page

Developed by Tim Gordon.
